title: algernonia amazonica
intro: Algernonia amazonica, also known as the Amazonian coral tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of Algernonia amazonica include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Algernonia amazonica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
